content: كِفاَيَة نور اِلشَّارِع، مِش لاَزِم تَنَوَّر اِلجِنِينَة
translations: eng:there is enough light from the street, no need to light the garden

transcriptions.arabizi: kifaeya noor ilshaariA, mish laezim tanawwar ilgineena
